name: Country Style Bean Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium onions, sliced and separated into rings
1 Large green pepper, cut in strips and halved crosswise
2 Cans red kidney beans, (15.5 oz.) drained
1 Tbsp. chopped canned green chili peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven or large kettle, cook onions and green pepper in hot cooking oil until tender but not brown.
2. Stir in all three kinds of beans, chicken broth, beer, paprika, chili powder, mustard, chopped canned green chili peppers, basil, and oregano.
3. Bring the mixture to boiling.
4. Reduce heat and cover. Simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
5. (Cool and chill the soup if you are planning to reheat.)
6. Top each serving with croutons and shredded cheese.
7. To reheat the chilled soup, place in a large kettle, cover, and bring to boiling for 45 minutes, stirring a bit.
